name: ux-mock-audit
description: Bi-directional audit of UX Design System documents against HTML mock implementations. Captures screenshots via Puppeteer at multiple breakpoints, performs visual comparison, and generates: (1) markdown analysis report, (2) annotated HTML files with 11-category color-coded highlights and interactive panel, (3) visual audit pages with screenshot overlay annotations, (4) interactive coverage heatmap, and (5) screenshot gallery. Supports project-specific rules for framework compliance (Shadcn, Material UI, Bootstrap, etc.) and delta mode for regression tracking.
